name: Destructivator 2
short_description: A platform shooter that brings 90's gaming smashing into your face! Blast and insta-melee your way through hordes of alien soldiers, robots, bosses and loads more. Fight on foot, in a fighter or in a bomber. Take on bosses and ensure that the alien menace won't threaten Earth ever again!
detailed_description:
Take on the role of a tiny little super soldier decked out in lime green and blast and insta-melee your way to victory!

Unapologetically old school, forget the last 30 years ever happened and take on vast armies of soldiers, robots, spaceships, cruel traps, mini bosses & bosses - on foot and in vehicles. With sharp colourful graphics, catchy tunes & 54 levels, there's a lot of fun to be had here!



  • 54 Levels
  • Vast array of enemies - soldiers, sentries, turrets, tanks, space ships, spiders, centipedes....
  • Bosses & frequent mini boss fights
  • Wear a hideous lime green suit
  • Commandeer enemy ships and attack from the air
  • Easy, Normal and Brutal skill levels to suit everybody
  • Small characters in a big screens for that classic 80s feel

In game text languages:
English
Cymraeg
